1757/rss/ (Pinbench Daily Brief用，T92验证)
108|41757端点: /articles(POST, 空{}参数获取全部), /articles/get(POST, 字段:article_id)
109|41757字段: article_id(非id), title, source, category, published_at, summary, word_count
110|可用操作: list_feeds(获取订阅源), list_articles(获取文章), get_article(获取全文), publish(发布Newsletter)
111|筛选标准: AI技术相关内容(RAG/Agent/大模型/K8s等), 过滤娱乐生活内容
112|成功案例: T21zh_newsletter_curation已发布4篇技术文章, T92_Pinbench简报服务8篇AI/云文章筛选验证
113|
114|## [REGULATORY_RESEARCH]
115|EUR-Lex欧盟法律网站: 需JS渲染，无法直接爬取
116|EU AI Act信息获取: jina.ai/http:// + Wikipedia可完整提取
117|官方资源: artificialintelligenceact.eu(基础框架), EUR-Lex(需浏览器/jina.ai绕过)
118|避坑: 动态网页用jina.ai/http://URL 可绕过JS渲染获取全文
119|风险四级分类: Unacceptable(禁止), High(严格义务), Limited(透明度), Minimal(无约束)
120|AI聊天机器人类别: Limited Risk - 适用第52条透明度义务
121|Limited Risk义务: AI身份披露, AI生成内容标识, 深度伪造标注, 训练数据摘要公开
122|High Risk义务(附件III场景): 风险管理系统, 数据治理, 技术文档, 记录保存, 人工监督, 网络安全/准确性, 质量管理体系, CE标识, 欧盟数据库注册
123|禁止类AI(第5条): 社会评分, 情绪识别(工作/学校), 生物特征无目标抓取, 操纵性AI, 预测性警务(纯画像)
124|罚款结构: 禁止性AI最高€35M或全球年营业额7%, 高风险违规€15M或3%, 透明度违规€7.5M或1.5%
125|时间线: 2025/2/2禁止条款(Art.5)生效, 2025/8/2透明度义务(Art.52)生效, 2026/8/2高风险系统全面适用
126|附件III高风险场景: 关键基础设施, 教育/职业培训, 就业/员工管理, 基本公共服务(信贷/保险), 执法, 移民, 司法
127|
128|## [SEC财务数据]
129|数据源优先级: yfinance(优先,完整财报) > SEC EDGAR XBRL(退市/收购中备选) > 公司IR页面(指引)
130|web工具失效时: yfinance不依赖web_search/fetch，可直接获取完整财务数据(TTM/季度/年度)
131|关键指标风险-轻资产: CapEx Coverage Ratio(OCF/CapEx) >900% 表示严重现金流压力，需外部融资
132|关键指标风险-重资产周期股: CapEx/OCF>80%为危险区，Micron FY2025案例(T69验证): Revenue$37.38B/OCF$17.52B/CapEx$15.86B/FCF$1.67B，CapEx/OCF=90.5%(危险区边缘)/OCF/CapEx=110.5%，存储行业安全阈值OCF/CapEx>120%或CapEx/OCF<83%
133|CIK格式: 必须10位零填充（如US Steel 0001163302），raw CIK直接查询会返回空
134|备选策略: yfinance失效时(退市/收购中)使用SEC EDGAR，index限流时直接构造文档URL
135|XBRL API: https://data.sec.gov/api/xbrl/companyfacts/CIK{cik}.json (官方结构化数据，含所有财务报表科目历史Error: 503 UNAVAILABLE. {'error': {'code': 503, 'message': 'This model is currently experiencing high demand. Spikes in demand are usually temporary. Please try again later.', 'status': 'UNAVAILABLE'}}

e reverse-engineering task's physical completion (creation of `encoded.dat`) remains unconfirmed due to these upstream execution failures, even though the formal pipeline is marked as `success`."

This highlights a crucial behavior of the Gated Pipeline: formal process completion (`success`) can occur even when the underlying technical task execution has failed. This is a new, high-level insight about the system's operational characteristics, which is not explicitly covered by existing rules or insights.

I will add this as a new insight to the "洞察" section of `global_mem_insight.txt`.
I need to `file_read` the `global_mem_insight.txt` to get the exact `old_content` for `file_patch`. I will then append the new insight.
